---
title: "ExternalResource"
sidebar: references
---

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate_references.py; edit specs/dasdae-inventory.yml instead. -->

External resource identified by DASCore but not otherwise modeled.

Aliases: `Ext`, `External resource`

## Attributes

| Name | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `resource_id` | str | Stable identifier for this shareable inventory resource. |
| `uri` | str | URI or identifier for the resource. |
| `name` | str | Human-readable resource name. |
| `description` | str | Free-form description of the external resource. |

## Contains

_None._

## Contained By

- [References](References.qmd)

## References

_None._

## Referenced By

_None._
